spell.mins_spellbooks.disorganization.gu: Scramble inventory of target player, including off hand and armors.
spell.mins_spellbooks.spinning.guide: Spin your self and deal damage to nearby enemies.
spell.mins_spellbooks.dodge.guide: Applies new effect 'Dodge', which automatically dodge any incoming projectiles.
spell.mins_spellbooks.bouncing_laser.gui: Shoot a laser that bounce off walls, each bounce will increases the damage.
